title: oonopsis engelmannii
intro: Oonopsis engelmannii, also known as Engelmann's goldenrod, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect wounds. The plant is rich in flavonoids and saponins, which are believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Oonopsis engelmannii can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat various health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
